overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a stormy night at a harbor. The character walks along a wooden pier toward a lighthouse, then turns inland through harbor buildings and alongside railway tracks as lightning illuminates the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor pier with lighthouse ahead

events.description: lightning strikes the lighthouse area, illuminating the stormy sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pier toward the lighthouse, facing the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the harbor pier
wooden safety railing along the pier edge
tall lighthouse structure with illuminated windows at the pier end
wooden harbor buildings with warm interior lighting
dark ocean water visible beyond the pier railing

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden harbor pier at night during a storm. The lighthouse stands illuminated at the end of the pier, while wooden warehouses line the left side. At 17 seconds, lightning strikes near the lighthouse, briefly illuminating the dark clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor street between wooden industrial buildings

events.description: character turns 180 degrees away from the lighthouse to walk inland

agents.ego_description: turning around to walk away from the pier, heading inland through the harbor area

entered.detail: industrial wooden structures with lit windows lining the path
muddy dirt path through the harbor district
railway tracks becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the lighthouse and walks inland through a harbor district. The wooden pier gives way to a dirt road flanked by industrial wooden buildings. Railway tracks become visible in the distance as the character approaches the edge of the harbor.

agents.ego_description: walking parallel to the train tracks, passing wooden warehouses and a parked wagon

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon parked beside the warehouse

entered.detail: large wooden industrial warehouse with double doors
wooden wagon with large wheels parked near the building
stacks of wooden shipping crates and cargo
tall pole with lantern lighting the railway area

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside railway tracks passing industrial warehouses. A horse-drawn wagon sits parked beside a wooden building, with crates and cargo stacked nearby. The area is dimly lit by railway lanterns as the storm continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway yard with multiple crossing tracks

events.description: character crosses over the railway tracks, stepping between the rails
bright lightning flash illuminates the sky and railway yard

agents.ego_description: crossing the railway tracks and continuing through the rail yard toward distant lights

entered.detail: multiple parallel railway tracks crossing the path
tall signal tower with red and blue lights
weathered wooden fence lining the railway yard

segments.scene_description: The character crosses multiple railway tracks in an open rail yard. A tall signal tower with colored lights stands to the left, while distant harbor lights glow through the storm. Lightning flashes across the sky at 60 seconds, illuminating the scene as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy harbor at night, transitioning from a coastal pier toward an industrial rail yard. It begins with the character walking along a wooden pier toward an illuminated lighthouse, while lightning strikes briefly light up the dark clouds above the flanking warehouses. As the character turns away from the coast, the wooden planks give way to a dirt road that leads inland through a harbor district of industrial wooden buildings. The scene then shifts toward a series of railway tracks where the character passes parked horse-drawn wagons and stacked cargo under the dim glow of railway lanterns. Finally, the camera moves across an open rail yard past a tall signal tower, as another flash of lightning illuminates the distant harbor lights and the surrounding storm.
